headline: Episode 18
summary: Headlines include coronavirus pandemic in the UK and Japan, IPOs and food & beverage
body_text:
This edition features these stories from ft.com

UK poised to expand Covid booster programme to all adults

WHO warns of ‘very high’ risk from new Omicron coronavirus variant

Half of this year’s big IPOs are trading below listing price

Plant-based meat loses its sizzle in US as sales fall
